title: Year Three Complete: December 2028
author: Anonymous Researcher
Chronicles Archive
description: 2028: Year we crossed multiple thresholds I'm not supposed to discuss. Some amazing. Some terrifying. Most are both. 2029: We're going into production. The world changes soon.
content:
**October 14, 2028**

Collaboration with aerospace division. They're working on [REDACTED] with implications for Mars colonization.

Timeline: First mission 2032.

Terraform timeline: 2045-2060.

What could possibly go wrong with planetary engineering?

---

**November 8, 2028**

Saw a demo today I literally cannot describe without violating 7 NDAs.

But imagine sci-fi, then multiply by 10, then add "it actually works."

The 2030s are going to be absolutely wild.

---

**December 31, 2028**

2028: The year we crossed multiple thresholds I'm not supposed to discuss.

Some of these are amazing. Some are terrifying.

Most are both.

2029: We're going into production. The world changes soon.

---

Year Three: We crossed the line from research to deployment.

Everything we built would soon be in the real world.

No more lab safety. Real-world consequences.

— *Recovered from personal archive, 2030*

**Related Chronicles:**
- [Terraforming Mars Disaster (2056)](/articles/terraforming-mars-disaster-2056)
- [The Build-Up Series](/articles?tag=backstory)
